Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nye]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — The Nye are shadow-folk described as humanoids made of cloth and shadow who attempt to strangle outsiders with chains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — The Nye serve as the keepers of the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — The Nye craft thin leather shoes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — The Nye cannot be killed by a sword and seek such injuries as badges of honor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — The Nye are composed of layers of black cloth and pale moonlight that flows like blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — The Nye are described as having movements that are both graceful and eerily silent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — The Nye use black chains as weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — The Nye test individuals who seek them with rage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — The Nye are inhabitants of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — The Nye possess the grace to move swiftly, walk unseen, and run lightly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The Nye wear black robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — A Nye stood behind Simon holding chains around his throat in a metal noose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The Nye are bound to the House and cannot stay out of it for too long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The Nye do not leave their home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The Nye possess an essence that can slow time.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — The Nye are a group associated with moonlight essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Indirial is accelerated by the power of the Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — The Nye are people in Valinhall who use a forge to repair weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — The Nye are responsible for returning swords to their racks in the entry hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — The Nye usually do the work of repairing things from the armory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Nye are beings of shadows and clothes with an essence that provides life and power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Nye have an Eldest who leads them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Nye have other concerns today.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Nye appear as men in black clothes and hooded black cloaks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Nye appear to be bundles of cloth given life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — The Nye collapse into shadows and moonlight essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — A Nye used a length of cold metal to draw tight around Simon's throat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The Nye possess a cold breath.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — The Nye have significant power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — The Nye attack inhabitants of Valinhall to test their alertness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — The Nye lost their grip on their chains during the attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Nye can materialize seemingly out of nowhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — The Nye are a group of beings that Valin has never been able to understand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Nye are shadowy forms that can swarm like ants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Nye can manipulate and communicate with intelligent guardians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Nye is a group or entity present in the room.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
